reason: Enabling the dracut FIPS module requires adding the fips dracut module and booting the kernel with fips=1. This change is not supported on an already installed system and can render the system unbootable, leading to loss of access. Therefore it is classified as too dangerous to remediate automatically.
estimated_impact: reboot required; authentication/authorization affected; potential boot failure; system instability; loss of console/SSH access if kernel cannot boot; non‑compliance with FIPS policy if not applied correctly
